source_jobs.title: Technical Product Manager
source_jobs.description:
Our Series-B funded Client is tackling complex problems in Ag-Tech space utilizing Computer Vision, ML & AI. Seeking a Sr. Product Manager to join their Austin office.




RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Deeply understand our customers and partners, their needs, and the broader market through research, interviews, and beta testing of new products.

 - Build business and revenue models, to recommend new products and growth opportunities.

 - Plan a high-impact product strategy and roadmap.

 - Drive the full product life cycle, from planning and prioritization, through requirement definition and execution, to product roll-out and usage monitoring.


REQUIREMENTS

 - Business analysis and strategic thinking capabilities

 - Experience in driving projects with cross-functional colleagues and partners

 - Ability to simplify complex feedback and technical data into crystal clear ideas

 - Creative and entrepreneurial

 - Independent and a leader

 - Excellent teamwork skills

 - Excellent presentation & communication skills in English, written and verbal

 - Passionate and target-oriented

 - 4+ years of experience in product management

 - Startup experience is a plus

source_jobs.title: AI Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Our VC-backed Client based in TX is seeking an AI Engineer (open to Remote).



Key Responsibilities

 - Lead creation & implementation of RAG systems

 - Architect multi-agent systems that operate effectively within our platform

 - Build highly scalable LLM-powered systems that can handle enterprise-level workloads

 - LLM fine-tuning initiatives to customize models for specific business domains and use cases

 - Optimize LLM performance, cost, and reliability in production environments

 - Mentor and develop junior engineers in AI/ML best practices

 - Evaluate emerging AI technologies for potential adoption

Experience

 - Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field

 - 8+ years of backend engineering experience in Python

 - 3+ years of hands-on experience building and deploying machine learning systems

 - Experience building solutions at scale with large enterprise data

source_jobs.title: Lead Backend Developer
source_jobs.description:
Our Client is a Series C-funded Tech Startup based in Austin, TX seeking a Lead Backend Developer.

Requirements:

 - 2+ Years managing web platform development projects and engagements

 - 5+ years of professional development experience (python), including writing and optimizing queries.

 - 3+ years of direct experience with database optimization techniques

 - 3+ years of experience developing and/or managing enterprise-scale PostgreSQL implementations

 - 3+ years of experience managing development teams and communicating

 - 2+ Years developing on Django ORM and Django REST Framework

 - Personality: driven, self-motivated, adaptable, empathetic, energetic, detail-oriented

source_jobs.title: Product Designer
source_jobs.description:
Our Client is a FinTech startup seeking a Product Designer for a full-time position, fully-remote.

In this role you can expect to:

 - Design flows, wireframes and prototypes and review with the team

 - Extend, develop, and maintain the Bypass design language

 - Conduct research to help the product team better understand our users

 - Contribute to the working knowledge of user behavior in our product

 - Maintain working relationships with engineering, product managers, and product owners • Collaborate with engineering and test during the product development process

 - Design supplemental assets such as illustrations, icons and some marketing materials Basic

Qualifications:

 - 3+ years of Product Designer at B2B SaaS Company

 - Figma experience

 - Experience working with a team of engineers and product managers

notes: Small sample size, but diverse tech roles and startup-like language
